name: Lying Hip Lift on Stability Ball
shortDescription: A hip-thrusting exercise using a stability ball to engage glutes, hamstrings, and core.
instructions: Lie with your upper back and arms on the floor and your feet on a stability ball. Brace your core, drive through your heels, and lift your hips to form a straight line from shoulders to knees, then lower back down with control.
steps: Lie on your back with arms by your sides and feet on the stability ball.
Bend knees at 90 degrees and keep feet hip-width apart.
Drive through your heels and squeeze your glutes to lift your hips.
Pause at the top, keeping your body in a straight line.
Lower your hips back down with control.
breathing: Exhale when lifting hips, inhale when lowering hips.
